hero.title: Connecting You with Trusted Local Service Professionals
hero.subtitle: Find verified carpenters, electricians, plumbers, and more in your area. Safe, reliable, and just a click away.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Browse from a wide range of trusted local service providers

features.title: Why ServNest?
features.aadhaarDesc: All service providers undergo Aadhaar verification for your safety and trust.
features.searchDesc: Find the right professional by category, location, rating, and experience.
features.ratingsDesc: Read genuine reviews from other customers and make informed decisions.

trust.title: Safety & Verification Policy
trust.desc: Every service provider on ServNest is verified through Aadhaar authentication. We ensure background checks and maintain a zero-tolerance policy for fraud, so you can book services with complete peace of mind.

auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetEmailSentDesc: We've sent a password reset link to {{email}}. Check your inbox.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.passwordUpdatedDesc: Your password has been updated. Redirecting...
auth.invalidResetLink: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

aadhaar.title: Aadhaar Verification
aadhaar.subtitle: Verify your identity to build trust on ServNest
aadhaar.verifiedSubtitle: Your identity has been verified successfully.
aadhaar.label: Aadhaar Number

about.title: About
about.subtitle: ServNest bridges the gap between skilled local service providers and customers who need them. We believe every carpenter, plumber, and artisan deserves a digital presence.
about.trustDesc: Aadhaar-based verification ensures only genuine professionals join our platform.
about.communityDesc: Real ratings and reviews from customers help you find the best professionals.
about.empowerDesc: We help local workers expand their reach and grow their businesses digitally.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Name
contact.sentDesc: We'll get back to you soon.

customerDashboard.subtitle: Browse and book trusted service professionals
customerDashboard.profileSubtitle: Set up your customer profile to start browsing services
customerDashboard.noProvidersDesc: Try adjusting your filters or check back later.

providerDashboard.title: Service Provider Dashboard
providerDashboard.subtitle: Manage your profile and availability
providerDashboard.profileLive: Profile is live and visible to customers
providerDashboard.photoHint: Click to upload a profile photo (JPG, PNG, max 5MB)
providerDashboard.locationHint: Click 'Detect My Location' or enter coordinates manually for distance-based matching

booking.title: Book a Service
booking.noSlots: No available slots on this date. Try another day.
booking.notePlaceholder: Describe what you need, any special requirements...
booking.confirmedDesc: Your service has been booked successfully.

bookingTracker.noBookings: No bookings yet. Browse providers and book a service!
bookingTracker.cancelDesc: Are you sure you want to cancel your booking with
bookingTracker.cancelPlaceholder: Please tell us why you're cancelling...

providerBookings.noBookings: No bookings yet. Your bookings will appear here once customers book your services.

language.title: Choose Your Language
language.subtitle: Select your preferred language for the app

voiceSearch.notSupported: Voice search is not supported in your browser
voiceSearch.micDenied: Microphone permission denied. Please allow access.
voiceSearch.noSpeech: Voice not recognized. Please try again.
voiceSearch.error: Voice not recognized. Please try again.

emergency.toggleDesc: Find providers available for immediate urgent service
emergency.noProvidersDesc: Try disabling emergency mode or check back later.

leaderboard.title: 🏆 Monthly Top Providers
leaderboard.subtitle: Top Rated Service Providers This Month
leaderboard.transparency: Rankings are calculated based on ratings, completed jobs, and customer feedback to ensure fair and transparent recognition of top providers.

hallOfFame.title: Hall of Fame
hallOfFame.subtitle: Celebrating our top service providers from past months
hallOfFame.emptyDesc: Hall of Fame winners will appear here at the end of each month.

complaint.title: Report an Issue
complaint.submittedDesc: Your complaint has been recorded. Our team will review it shortly.
complaint.transparencyNote: ServNest ensures fair dispute resolution for both customers and service providers. All complaints are reviewed carefully by our admin team.

admin.title: Complaints Management
admin.subtitle: Review and resolve customer complaints
admin.searchPlaceholder: Search by ID, name, or type...
admin.resolutionNotesPlaceholder: Explain the resolution to the customer...
admin.flaggedDesc: {{count}} provider(s) have received 3+ high-severity complaints this month.

imageRequest.title: 📷 Upload a Photo – We'll Find the Right Service
imageRequest.subtitle: Take a photo of your problem and our AI will suggest the right service provider
imageRequest.dragDrop: Drag & drop an image here, or click to upload
imageRequest.invalidFormat: Please upload a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image
imageRequest.tooLarge: File size must be under 5 MB
imageRequest.analyzingDesc: Our AI is identifying the issue in your photo
imageRequest.noProviders: No providers available in this category right now.
imageRequest.loginRequired: Please log in to upload photos and find services.
imageRequest.analysisFailed: Could not analyze image. Please try again.
imageRequest.privacyNote: Your uploaded images are analyzed securely and used only for service matching. We respect your privacy.
